params.name: Hubble Telescope
params.source: Fragment Crafting (17.8%), Lottery Machine (0.80%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Super Treasure Maps (15%), Wishing (0.65%)
params.description:
On Jun 15, 1993, the Hubble Telescope captured the first HD image of the universe. On this day, humans finally caught a glimpse of the universe for the first time. An error of about 2.2 microns, equivalent to one-fifth of a hair, caused Hubble's focus to blur. Later, astronauts launched to repair it via the space shuttle Endeavour.

[Basic info]

Mirror stats: 13.2 meters in total, the maximum diameter is 4.2 meters

Mirrors: 2.4-meter primary mirror and 0.3-meter secondary mirror totally weigh  …
